final:
module johnson_counter (
	input clk,
	input reset,
	output reg [11:0] count);

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
	if (reset)
		count <= 12'b0;
	else
		count <= {count[10:0], ~count[11]};
	end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count; // This statement does not change the value of count
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: count <= count; // This statement does not change the value of count
